$comment: Holo Library — canonical registration is via the hub catalog (tools/gen-app-defs.mjs). This file mirrors the player's shape so the app is launchable; regenerate from the catalog when wiring into the launcher.
name: Holo Library
summary: The open web's audiobooks and books, owned by κ, listened to and read as one synced object.

description.p: Your library shouldn't be a subscription you rent. Discover any audiobook or book from the open web — LibriVox, Project Gutenberg, the Internet Archive — and own it as a signed κ-title you carry.

A title is one object: audio, text, and a synced read-along track, auto-manufactured by aligning a free narration to its free text. Listen, read, or both — switch mid-sentence with no re-fetch. Share it as one link that opens running on any device.

ul: The open web is the catalog — nothing to host
Audio + text from different libraries, merged into one work
Read-along auto-manufactured by forced alignment, no publisher
Owned, not rented — a κ-manifest you carry
Commercial catalogs are indexed and linked out, never ingested

releases.description: P0-P3: holo-title manifest, open-library work hub, forced-alignment syncmap, and the Holo Read cursor surface.
